subcodes.first_line: This is a Book that speaketh the truth, and wherein is mentioned that which gladdeneth the hearts of them that have attained recognition, and whereby the holy breezes are wafted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینطق بالحق و فیه یذکر ما یسر به افئده العارفین و بذلک یهب نفحات القدس
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @power of the Manifestation of God, @praise and encouragement, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha
